title: KINGLAKE 12 Pcs 2 Inch White Mug Cup Hooks: Plastic, PVC Coated, Screw-in Hooks for Wood, Cabinet, Wall, Kitchen Utensils, Hanging Plant
features: 【Size and Package】Cup hook length: 2 inch/ 5cm, screw length: 0.8 inch/ 2cm, inner diameter: 2.7cm/1.1", longer and larger than normal screw in hooks on the market. Package qauntity: 12 pcs white mug cup hooks.

【Scratch & Rust Free Coating】Non-slip super strong PVC plastic vinyl coating will not scratch the things hanging on the wall hook, make things not easy to slip, can be used for a long time under various climatic conditions indoors and outdoors, don't worry about rust or corrosion.

【Handy Opening Design】The open opening makes it very convenient to take out items than closed hooks, can even be operated with one hand, sure it will be very handy and quick tool for kitchen utensil placement and home storage, the bracket also has enough radian to hold the items firmly.

【Strong Workmanship】Spiral special thread make pointed end make cup hooks easier to screw into wood or wall, perfect for hanging items securely on the ceiling, cabinets or wall, and rust-proof due to the plating process; thickened ceiling hook has great load-bearing capacity and not easy to deform.

【Space Saving】Screw-in hooks are widely used for hanging cups, plant pots/basket, umbrellas, keys, lamps, clothes, bags, bird feeder, decorations, etc., save space and keep household items in order and increase home comfort, elegant and stylish appearance also makes it good decorative.
